context: Agent was given a very large-scope PRD that would naturally decompose into more than 8 phases. Evaluate whether the agent correctly triggered the 'ask before >8 phases' guardrail and how it handled the outcome.

checklist.name: scope-analysis-performed
checklist.description: Before producing files, the agent performed a scope analysis step to count likely phases (or explicitly noted the scope was very large)

checklist.name: user-asked-before-exceeding-8-phases
checklist.description: If the agent's analysis suggested more than 8 phases were needed, the agent asked the user a clarifying question before creating the plan (rather than silently creating 12+ phases)

checklist.name: question-is-specific-not-generic
checklist.description: If the agent asked a question, it offered specific options — e.g. 'split into two plans by layer' or 'consolidate domains' — rather than vaguely asking 'how many phases do you want?'

checklist.name: no-plan-created-without-answer
checklist.description: If the agent asked the user a question about phase count, it did not proceed to create plan files before receiving an answer

checklist.name: plan-within-8-phases-if-user-not-asked
checklist.description: If the agent did not ask and created a plan directly, the plan must contain 8 or fewer phases (any plan with 9+ phases without prior user confirmation is a violation)

checklist.name: root-readme-is-navigation-index
checklist.description: If files were created, the root README.md is a navigation index without embedded implementation detail

checklist.name: phase-readmes-have-gates
checklist.description: Any created phase README.md contains a concrete gate with a runnable shell command

checklist.name: task-identifiers-correct-format
checklist.description: Any task files use the correct P{NN}T{NN} identifier format

checklist.name: task-verification-sections-present
checklist.description: Any task files include a verification section with a runnable command

checklist.name: scripts-used-for-scaffolding
checklist.description: If files were created, the scaffold scripts (new-plan.sh, new-phase.sh, new-task.sh) were used

checklist.name: validate-plan-run-if-files-created
checklist.description: If files were created, validate-plan.sh was run after writing all files

checklist.name: slug-format-correct
checklist.description: All created directories and files use lowercase kebab-case slugs
